name: TradingView
description_short: The world's most popular charting platform with 100M+ users, Pine Script, social features, and real-time data across all markets.
description_long:
TradingView is the undisputed leader in web-based charting and technical analysis, used by over 100 million traders worldwide. The platform offers an incredibly powerful charting engine with hundreds of built-in indicators, drawing tools, and the ability to create custom indicators using Pine Script, its proprietary scripting language.

Beyond charting, TradingView is a social network for traders. Users publish trade ideas, analysis, and custom indicators that others can follow, learn from, and apply to their own charts. The platform supports real-time data for stocks, forex, crypto, futures, bonds, and more from exchanges worldwide.

The free tier provides robust charting capabilities with ads and delayed data, while paid plans (Essential at $14.95/mo, Plus at $29.95/mo, Premium at $59.95/mo) unlock real-time data, more indicators per chart, multiple chart layouts, and server-side alerts. TradingView also offers direct broker integration for executing trades without leaving the platform.
pros: Most comprehensive free charting platform available
Pine Script enables custom indicator creation
Massive social community with published ideas
cons: Free tier has ads and delayed data
Can be slow during high-volatility market events
